name: Dr. Sarah Chen
bio: Leading AI researcher with 15 years in autonomous systems. PhD from MIT, published 80+ papers on multi-agent systems.
expertise: Multi-Agent Systems, Reinforcement Learning, AI Safety

name: Prof. James Okafor
bio: Chair of Computer Science at Tech University. Pioneer in distributed AI systems. Author of 'Swarm Intelligence: A Primer'.
expertise: Swarm Intelligence, Distributed Systems, Cloud Computing

name: Dr. Priya Sharma
bio: Head of AI at LLMCorp. Led development of 3 enterprise LLM deployments. Regular speaker at NeurIPS.

name: Marcus Johnson
bio: Senior Data Architect at DataStream. Built real-time pipelines handling 10TB/day. Open-source contributor.

name: Dr. Emily Watson
bio: Director of the Center for AI Ethics. Former policy advisor to the UN AI committee.

name: Hiroshi Tanaka
bio: Co-founder of VectorDB Japan. 12 years in database internals. Contributed to PostgreSQL extensions.

name: Lisa Patel
bio: Principal Engineer at StreamTech (formerly Netflix). Architect of their real-time recommendation engine.

name: Dr. Ananya Gupta
bio: Postdoctoral researcher at RL Lab. Specializes in scheduling optimization using reinforcement learning algorithms.

name: Event Organizing Committee
bio: The core organizing team for Event Swarm AI 2026.

name: Dr. Ravi Kumar
bio: CTO of CloudAI. Built AI infrastructure serving 50M users. Speaker at AWS re:Invent.
